name: mojo-multidim-setitem-tests
description: Implement variadic-Int __setitem__ on ExTensor and corresponding multi-dim tests. Use when: (1) adding stride-aware multi-dim assignment to a Mojo tensor (t[i,j]=v), (2) writing 2D/3D __setitem__ tests verifying flat index = sum(idx*stride), (3) implementing a variadic-Int setitem that delegates to 1D overload.
